subtitle.en: How current planetary positions overlay the birth chart, creating evolving life themes through slow and fast planet transits
subtitle.hi: वर्तमान ग्रह स्थितियाँ जन्म कुण्डली पर कैसे आच्छादित होती हैं, धीमे और तीव्र ग्रह गोचर से जीवन विषय कैसे बनते हैं
subtitle.ta: கிரகங்களின் தற்போதைய நிலை ஜாதகத்தின் மீது எவ்வாறு பலன் அளிக்கிறது  –  கோசார பகுப்பாய்வின் அடிப்படைகள்
subtitle.te: గ్రహాల ప్రస్తుత స్థితి జాతకంపై ఎలా ఫలితమిస్తుంది  –  గోచార విశ్లేషణ ప్రాథమికాంశాలు
subtitle.bn: গ্রহের বর্তমান অবস্থান জন্মকুণ্ডলীতে কীভাবে ফল দেয়  –  গোচর বিশ্লেষণের মূলতত্ত্ব
subtitle.kn: ಗ್ರಹಗಳ ಪ್ರಸ್ತುತ ಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಜನ್ಮ ಕುಂಡಲಿಯ ಮೇಲೆ ಹೇಗೆ ಫಲ ಕೊಡುತ್ತದೆ  –  ಗೋಚಾರ ವಿಶ್ಲೇಷಣೆಯ ಮೂಲ ತತ್ತ್ವಗಳು
subtitle.mr: ग्रहांची सध्याची स्थिती जन्मकुंडलीवर कसे फल देते  –  गोचर विश्लेषणाची मूलतत्त्वे
subtitle.gu: ગ્રહોની વર્તમાન સ્થિતિ જન્મ કુંડળી પર કેવી રીતે ફળ આપે છે  –  ગોચર વિશ્લેષણનાં મૂળ તત્ત્વો
subtitle.mai: ग्रहक वर्तमान स्थिति जन्मकुंडलीपर कोना फल दैत अछि  –  गोचर विश्लेषणक मूल तत्त्व

question.en: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.hi: शनि लगभग कितने समय तक एक राशि में रहता है?
question.ta: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.te: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.bn: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.kn: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.mr: शनि लगभग कितने समय तक एक राशि में रहता है?
question.gu: How long does Saturn approximately stay in one zodiac sign?
question.mai: शनि लगभग केतेक काल धरि एक राशि मे रहैत अछि?

explanation.en: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.
explanation.hi: शनि एक पूर्ण राशिचक्र परिक्रमा में लगभग 29.5 वर्ष लेता है, प्रत्येक 12 राशियों में लगभग 2.5 वर्ष रहता है। इसी धीमी गति के कारण शनि गोचर दीर्घकालिक जीवन विषय निर्मित करता है।
explanation.ta: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.
explanation.te: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.
explanation.bn: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.
explanation.kn: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.

explanation.gu: Saturn takes approximately 29.5 years to complete one zodiacal revolution, spending about 2.5 years in each of the 12 signs. This slow pace is why Saturn transits create long-lasting life themes.
explanation.mai: शनि केँ एक राशि चक्र पूरा करबाक लेल लगभग २९.५ वर्ष लगैत अछि, १२ राशि मे सँ प्रत्येक मे लगभग २.५ वर्ष बिताबैत। ई धीमा गति एहि लेल अछि जे शनि गोचर दीर्घकालिक जीवनक विषय बनबैत अछि।

question.en: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.hi: वैदिक ज्योतिष में गोचर मुख्यतः सूर्य राशि (सूर्य लग्न) से पढ़ा जाता है।
question.ta: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.te: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.bn: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.kn: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.mr: वैदिक ज्योतिष में गोचर मुख्यतः सूर्य राशि (सूर्य लग्न) से पढ़ा जाता है।
question.gu: In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Sun sign (Surya Lagna).
question.mai: वैदिक ज्योतिष मे, गोचर मुख्य रूप सँ सूर्य राशि (सूर्य लग्न) सँ देखल जाइत अछि।

explanation.en: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.hi: असत्य। वैदिक ज्योतिष में गोचर मुख्यतः चन्द्र राशि (चन्द्र लग्न) से पढ़ा जाता है, सूर्य राशि से नहीं। चन्द्रमा मन और भावनात्मक संसार का प्रतिनिधि है, इसलिए गोचर फल अनुभव करने का स्वाभाविक सन्दर्भ बिन्दु है।
explanation.ta: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.te: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.bn: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.kn: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.mr: असत्य। वैदिक ज्योतिष में गोचर मुख्यतः चन्द्र राशि (चन्द्र लग्न) से पढ़ा जाता है, सूर्य राशि से नहीं। चन्द्रमा मन और भावनात्मक संसार का प्रतिनिधि है, इसलिए गोचर फल अनुभव करने का स्वाभाविक सन्दर्भ बिन्दु है।
explanation.gu: False. In Vedic astrology, transits are primarily read from the Moon sign (Chandra Lagna), not the Sun sign. The Moon represents the mind and emotional landscape, making it the natural reference point for experiencing transit effects.
explanation.mai: गलत। वैदिक ज्योतिष मे, गोचर मुख्य रूप सँ चन्द्र राशि (चन्द्र लग्न) सँ देखल जाइत अछि, सूर्य राशि सँ नहि। चन्द्रमा मन आ भावनात्मक परिदृश्यक प्रतिनिधित्व करैत अछि, एकरा गोचरक प्रभावक अनुभव करबाक लेल स्वाभाविक संदर्भ बिंदु बनबैत अछि।

question.en: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.hi: कौन-से ग्रह "मन्द ग्रह" माने जाते हैं और प्रमुख जीवन विषय निर्मित करते हैं?
question.ta: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.te: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.bn: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.kn: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.mr: कौन-से ग्रह "मन्द ग्रह" माने जाते हैं और प्रमुख जीवन विषय निर्मित करते हैं?
question.gu: Which planets are considered "slow" (Manda Graha) and create major life themes?
question.mai: कोन ग्रह "धीमा" (मंद ग्रह) मानल जाइत अछि आ प्रमुख जीवनक विषय बनबैत अछि?

explanation.en: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.hi: शनि (~2.5 वर्ष/राशि), गुरु (~1 वर्ष/राशि) और राहु-केतु (~1.5 वर्ष/राशि) मन्दगति ग्रह हैं। प्रत्येक भाव पर दीर्घकालिक प्रभाव के कारण इनके गोचर जीवन के प्रमुख विषय और मोड़ निर्धारित करते हैं।
explanation.ta: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.te: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.bn: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.kn: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.mr: शनि (~2.5 वर्ष/राशि), गुरु (~1 वर्ष/राशि) और राहु-केतु (~1.5 वर्ष/राशि) मन्दगति ग्रह हैं। प्रत्येक भाव पर दीर्घकालिक प्रभाव के कारण इनके गोचर जीवन के प्रमुख विषय और मोड़ निर्धारित करते हैं।
explanation.gu: Saturn (~2.5 years/sign), Jupiter (~1 year/sign), and Rahu-Ketu (~1.5 years/sign) are slow-moving planets. Their transits define the major themes and turning points of life due to their prolonged influence on each house.
explanation.mai: शनि (लगभग २.५ वर्ष/राशि), गुरु (लगभग १ वर्ष/राशि), आ राहु-केतु (लगभग १.५ वर्ष/राशि) धीमा गति करयवला ग्रह छी। हुनकर गोचर प्रत्येक भाव पर हुनकर दीर्घकालिक प्रभावक कारण जीवनक प्रमुख विषय आ मोड़ परिभाषित करैत अछि।

question.en: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.hi: चन्द्र राशि से गुरु का गोचर किन भावों में शुभ माना जाता है?
question.ta: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.te: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.bn: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.kn: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.mr: चन्द्र राशि से गुरु का गोचर किन भावों में शुभ माना जाता है?
question.gu: Jupiter transiting in which houses from the Moon sign is considered favorable?
question.mai: चन्द्र राशि सँ कोन भाव मे गुरु गोचर करैत शुभ मानल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: Jupiter transiting in the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and 11th houses from the natal Moon is considered favorable. These positions support wealth, intelligence, relationships, fortune, and gains respectively.
explanation.hi: जन्म चन्द्रमा से 2, 5, 7, 9 और 11वें भाव में गुरु गोचर शुभ माना जाता है। ये स्थान क्रमशः धन, बुद्धि, सम्बन्ध, भाग्य और लाभ का समर्थन करते हैं।
explanation.ta: Jupiter transiting in the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and 11th houses from the natal Moon is considered favorable. These positions support wealth, intelligence, relationships, fortune, and gains respectively.

explanation.gu: Jupiter transiting in the 2nd, 5th, 7th, 9th, and 11th houses from the natal Moon is considered favorable. These positions support wealth, intelligence, relationships, fortune, and gains respectively.
explanation.mai: जन्म चन्द्र सँ दोसर, पाँचम, सातम्, नवम्, आ एगारहम भाव मे गुरु गोचर करैत शुभ मानल जाइत अछि। ई स्थिति क्रमशः धन, बुद्धि, सम्बन्ध, भाग्य, आ लाभक समर्थन करैत अछि।

question.en: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.hi: सूर्य और चन्द्रमा जैसे तीव्र गति ग्रहों का गोचर विश्लेषण में नगण्य प्रभाव होता है।
question.ta: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.te: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.bn: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.kn: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.mr: सूर्य और चन्द्रमा जैसे तीव्र गति ग्रहों का गोचर विश्लेषण में नगण्य प्रभाव होता है।
question.gu: Fast-moving planets like the Sun and Moon have negligible effects in transit analysis.
question.mai: सूर्य आ चन्द्रमा जेना तीव्र गति करयवला ग्रह गोचर विश्लेषण मे नगण्य प्रभाव रखैत अछि।

explanation.en: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.hi: असत्य। तीव्र ग्रह अल्पकालिक प्रभाव देते हैं, परन्तु मन्द ग्रह गोचर द्वारा प्रतिश्रुत घटनाओं के लिए ट्रिगर का कार्य करते हैं। सूर्य (1 मास/राशि) और चन्द्रमा (2.25 दिन/राशि) प्रायः घटना के सटीक दिन को इंगित करते हैं।
explanation.ta: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.te: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.bn: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.kn: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.mr: असत्य। तीव्र ग्रह अल्पकालिक प्रभाव देते हैं, परन्तु मन्द ग्रह गोचर द्वारा प्रतिश्रुत घटनाओं के लिए ट्रिगर का कार्य करते हैं। सूर्य (1 मास/राशि) और चन्द्रमा (2.25 दिन/राशि) प्रायः घटना के सटीक दिन को इंगित करते हैं।
explanation.gu: False. While fast planets create shorter-duration effects, they act as triggers for events promised by slow planet transits. The Sun (1 month/sign) and Moon (2.25 days/sign) often pinpoint the exact day an event fructifies.
explanation.mai: गलत। जखन कि तीव्र ग्रह कम अवधि कऽ प्रभाव उत्पन्न करैत अछि, ओ धीमा ग्रहक गोचर द्वारा प्रतिज्ञा कएल घटनाक लेल उत्प्रेरकक रूप मे काज करैत अछि। सूर्य (१ मास/राशि) आ चन्द्रमा (२.२५ दिन/राशि) प्रायः कोनो घटनाक फलित होयबाक सटीक दिनक पहचान करैत अछि।

question.en: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.hi: अष्टकवर्ग पद्धति में कितने बिन्दु वाली राशि गोचर के लिए शुभ मानी जाती है?
question.ta: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.te: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.bn: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.kn: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.mr: अष्टकवर्ग पद्धति में कितने बिन्दु वाली राशि गोचर के लिए शुभ मानी जाती है?
question.gu: In the Ashtakavarga system, a sign with how many bindus is considered favorable for transit?
question.mai: अष्टकवर्ग प्रणाली मे, केतेक बिंदुवला राशि गोचरक लेल शुभ मानल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.hi: अष्टकवर्ग में प्रत्येक ग्रह को 8 स्रोतों (7 ग्रह + लग्न) से बिन्दु (शुभ अंक) प्राप्त होते हैं। 4 या अधिक बिन्दु (अधिकतम 8 में से) वाली राशि उस ग्रह के गोचर के लिए शुभ मानी जाती है।
explanation.ta: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.te: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.bn: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.kn: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.mr: अष्टकवर्ग में प्रत्येक ग्रह को 8 स्रोतों (7 ग्रह + लग्न) से बिन्दु (शुभ अंक) प्राप्त होते हैं। 4 या अधिक बिन्दु (अधिकतम 8 में से) वाली राशि उस ग्रह के गोचर के लिए शुभ मानी जाती है।
explanation.gu: In Ashtakavarga, each planet receives bindus (benefic points) from 8 sources (7 planets + Lagna). A sign with 4 or more bindus (out of 8 maximum) is considered favorable for that planet's transit through it.
explanation.mai: अष्टकवर्ग मे, प्रत्येक ग्रह केँ ८ स्रोत सँ (७ ग्रह + लग्न) बिंदु (शुभ अंक) प्राप्त होइत अछि। ४ वा ओहि सँ बेसी बिंदुवला राशि (अधिकतम ८ मे सँ) ओ ग्रहक ओहि सँ गोचरक लेल शुभ मानल जाइत अछि।

explanation.en: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.hi: सर्वाष्टकवर्ग प्रत्येक राशि के लिए सभी 7 ग्रहों के व्यक्तिगत अष्टकवर्ग बिन्दुओं का संयुक्त योग है। 28 या अधिक SAV अंक (अधिकतम 56 में से) वाली राशि सामान्यतः शुभ मानी जाती है।
explanation.ta: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.te: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.bn: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.kn: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.mr: सर्वाष्टकवर्ग प्रत्येक राशि के लिए सभी 7 ग्रहों के व्यक्तिगत अष्टकवर्ग बिन्दुओं का संयुक्त योग है। 28 या अधिक SAV अंक (अधिकतम 56 में से) वाली राशि सामान्यतः शुभ मानी जाती है।
explanation.gu: Sarvashtakavarga is the combined total of all 7 planets' individual Ashtakavarga bindus for each sign. A sign with 28 or more SAV points (out of 56 maximum) is generally considered auspicious.
explanation.mai: सर्वाष्टकवर्ग सभ ७ ग्रहक व्यक्तिगत अष्टकवर्ग बिंदु कऽ प्रत्येक राशिक लेल कुल योग अछि। २८ वा ओहि सँ बेसी SAV बिंदुवला राशि (अधिकतम ५६ मे सँ) सामान्यतः शुभ मानल जाइत अछि।

question.en: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.hi: चन्द्रमा से 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10 और 12वें भाव में शनि गोचर सामान्यतः कठिन माना जाता है।
question.ta: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.te: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.bn: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.kn: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.mr: चन्द्रमा से 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10 और 12वें भाव में शनि गोचर सामान्यतः कठिन माना जाता है।
question.gu: Saturn transiting houses 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 8, 10, and 12 from the Moon is generally considered challenging.
question.mai: चन्द्रमा सँ १, २, ४, ५, ७, ८, १०, आ १२ भाव मे शनि गोचर करैत सामान्यतः चुनौतीपूर्ण मानल जाइत अछि।

explanation.en: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.hi: सत्य। शनि केवल चन्द्रमा से 3, 6 और 11वें भाव (उपचय भाव) में शुभ होता है। अन्य सभी भावों (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12) में शनि गोचर चुनौतियाँ, विलम्ब और कर्म-शिक्षा लाता है।
explanation.ta: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.te: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.bn: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.kn: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.mr: सत्य। शनि केवल चन्द्रमा से 3, 6 और 11वें भाव (उपचय भाव) में शुभ होता है। अन्य सभी भावों (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12) में शनि गोचर चुनौतियाँ, विलम्ब और कर्म-शिक्षा लाता है।
explanation.gu: True. Saturn is favorable only in the 3rd, 6th, and 11th from Moon (upachaya houses). In all other houses (1,2,4,5,7,8,10,12), Saturn's transit tends to bring challenges, delays, and karmic lessons.
explanation.mai: सत्य। शनि मात्र चन्द्रमा सँ तेसर, छठम, आ एगारहम मे (उपचय भाव) शुभ होइत अछि। अन्य सभ भाव मे (१,२,४,५,७,८,१०,१२), शनि गोचर चुनौती, विलम्ब, आ कर्मक पाठ लानय कऽ प्रवृत्ति रखैत अछि।

question.en: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.hi: मंगल एक राशि में लगभग कितने समय रहता है?
question.ta: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.te: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.bn: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.kn: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.mr: मंगल एक राशि में लगभग कितने समय रहता है?
question.gu: Mars transits one sign in approximately:
question.mai: मंगल एक राशि मे लगभग गोचर करैत अछि:

explanation.en: Mars takes about 1.5 to 2 months (roughly 45 days) per sign normally, completing one full zodiacal round in about 18 months. During retrograde periods, Mars can stay in one sign for up to 6 months.
explanation.hi: मंगल सामान्यतः प्रत्येक राशि में लगभग 1.5 से 2 मास (करीब 45 दिन) रहता है, लगभग 18 मासों में एक पूर्ण राशिचक्र पूरा करता है। वक्री काल में मंगल एक राशि में 6 मास तक रह सकता है।
explanation.ta: Mars takes about 1.5 to 2 months (roughly 45 days) per sign normally, completing one full zodiacal round in about 18 months. During retrograde periods, Mars can stay in one sign for up to 6 months.
explanation.te: Mars takes about 1.5 to 2 months (roughly 45 days) per sign normally, completing one full zodiacal round in about 18 months. During retrograde periods, Mars can stay in one sign for up to 6 months.
explanation.bn: Mars takes about 1.5 to 2 months (roughly 45 days) per sign normally, completing one full zodiacal round in about 18 months. During retrograde periods, Mars can stay in one sign for up to 6 months.

explanation.gu: Mars takes about 1.5 to 2 months (roughly 45 days) per sign normally, completing one full zodiacal round in about 18 months. During retrograde periods, Mars can stay in one sign for up to 6 months.
explanation.mai: मंगल केँ सामान्यतः प्रति राशि लगभग १.५ सँ २ मास (लगभग ४५ दिन) लगैत अछि, लगभग १८ मास मे एकटा पूर्ण राशि चक्र पूरा करैत। वक्री काल मे, मंगल एक राशि मे ६ मास धरि रहि सकैत अछि।

question.en: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.hi: अष्टकवर्ग विश्लेषण गोचर के सामान्य शुभ/अशुभ वर्गीकरण को परिवर्तित कर सकता है।
question.ta: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.te: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.bn: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.kn: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.mr: अष्टकवर्ग विश्लेषण गोचर के सामान्य शुभ/अशुभ वर्गीकरण को परिवर्तित कर सकता है।
question.gu: Ashtakavarga analysis can override the general favorable/unfavorable classification of a transit.
question.mai: अष्टकवर्ग विश्लेषण कोनो गोचरक सामान्य शुभ/अशुभ वर्गीकरण केँ अधिभावी भऽ सकैत अछि।

explanation.en: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.hi: सत्य। सामान्यतः अशुभ गोचर (जैसे चन्द्र से 8वें में शनि) यदि उस राशि में अष्टकवर्ग बिन्दु अधिक हों तो शमित हो सकता है। इसके विपरीत, कम बिन्दु वाली राशि में शुभ गोचर भी अपेक्षित फल नहीं दे सकता। अष्टकवर्ग भविष्यवाणी को सूक्ष्म करता है।
explanation.ta: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.te: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.bn: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.kn: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.mr: सत्य। सामान्यतः अशुभ गोचर (जैसे चन्द्र से 8वें में शनि) यदि उस राशि में अष्टकवर्ग बिन्दु अधिक हों तो शमित हो सकता है। इसके विपरीत, कम बिन्दु वाली राशि में शुभ गोचर भी अपेक्षित फल नहीं दे सकता। अष्टकवर्ग भविष्यवाणी को सूक्ष्म करता है।
explanation.gu: True. A generally unfavorable transit (e.g., Saturn in 8th from Moon) can be mitigated if the sign has high Ashtakavarga bindus. Conversely, a favorable transit in a low-bindu sign may not deliver expected results. Ashtakavarga fine-tunes predictions.
explanation.mai: सत्य। एकटा सामान्यतः अशुभ गोचर (जेना, चन्द्रमा सँ आठम मे शनि) कम कएल जा सकैत अछि यदि राशि मे उच्च अष्टकवर्ग बिंदु अछि। एकर विपरीत, कम बिंदुवला राशि मे एकटा शुभ गोचर अपेक्षित परिणाम नहि दऽ सकैत अछि। अष्टकवर्ग भविष्यवाणी केँ परिष्कृत करैत अछि।

question.en: The Double Transit theory requires both Jupiter AND Saturn to activate a house for major events to manifest.
question.hi: दोहरा गोचर सिद्धान्त के अनुसार प्रमुख घटनाओं हेतु गुरु और शनि दोनों को एक भाव को सक्रिय करना आवश्यक है।
question.ta: The Double Transit theory requires both Jupiter AND Saturn to activate a house for major events.

question.bn: The Double Transit theory requires both Jupiter AND Saturn to activate a house for major events.
question.kn: The Double Transit theory requires both Jupiter AND Saturn to activate a house for major events.

question.gu: The Double Transit theory requires both Jupiter AND Saturn to activate a house for major events.

explanation.en: The Double Transit (Dwi-Graha Gochar) principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn through transit or aspect.
explanation.hi: दोहरा गोचर (द्वि-ग्रह गोचर) सिद्धान्त कहता है कि प्रमुख जीवन घटनाओं हेतु गुरु और शनि दोनों द्वारा एक साथ सक्रियण आवश्यक है।
explanation.ta: The Double Transit principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn.
explanation.te: The Double Transit principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn.
explanation.bn: The Double Transit principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn.
explanation.kn: The Double Transit principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn.
explanation.mr: दोहरा गोचर सिद्धान्त कहता है कि प्रमुख जीवन घटनाओं हेतु गुरु और शनि दोनों आवश्यक हैं।
explanation.gu: The Double Transit principle states that major life events require simultaneous activation by both Jupiter and Saturn.
explanation.mai: दोहरा गोचर सिद्धान्त कहता है कि प्रमुख जीवन घटनाओं हेतु गुरु और शनि दोनों आवश्यक हैं।

question.kn: Which is the primary reference point for evaluating transits?
question.mr: वैदिक ज्योतिष में गोचर मूल्यांकन का प्राथमिक सन्दर्भ बिन्दु क्या है?
question.gu: Which is the primary reference point for evaluating transits?
question.mai: वैदिक ज्योतिष मे गोचरक मूल्यांकन करबाक लेल प्राथमिक संदर्भ बिंदु कोन अछि?

explanation.en: In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign (Janma Rashi) is the primary reference for transits, unlike Western astrology which uses the Sun sign.
explanation.hi: वैदिक ज्योतिष में चन्द्र राशि (जन्म राशि) गोचर का प्राथमिक सन्दर्भ बिन्दु है, पश्चिमी ज्योतिष के विपरीत जो सूर्य राशि का उपयोग करता है।
explanation.ta: In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign is the primary reference for transits.
explanation.te: In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign is the primary reference for transits.
explanation.bn: In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign is the primary reference for transits.
explanation.kn: In Vedic astrology, the Moon sign is the primary reference for transits.
